name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.7 Wizard clarity and browser-app tidy
label: Wizard clarity and browser-app tidy
release_notes: Clarifies that projects and routines are parent containers while steps, focus blocks, supporting time blocks and routine activities become calendar/task items; removes unfinished phone-app/PWA shortcut support from the release.
notes: Adds Creation Wizard helper text explaining that a project name is the parent container, not the calendar block or reminder.
Adds Creation Wizard helper text explaining that a routine name is the parent container, while routine activities become scheduled blocks.
Clarifies the choose-type step with a visible container-versus-activity note.
Removes unfinished phone-app/PWA shortcut support and related manifest/mobile shortcut files so Pathmark Online is presented as a browser app until mobile support can be implemented cleanly.
Keeps responsive browser containment and the v0.7.6 focus/support hierarchy work.
